variables.notes: Used 'Interest expenses' as primary interest-expense line and included 'Interest Expense' as a fallback priority label. Excluded hybrid debt instrument interest because it is a narrower financing line, not the preferred general interest expense.

variables.notes: Preferred the shareholders' equity line to avoid double counting with minority interest. Included total consolidated equity as fallback if labels vary over time.
